message:
ci: upgrade to Node 24 for npm trusted publishing

npm trusted publishing requires npm 11.5.1+. Node 22 ships with npm 10.9.4,
which causes auth failures. Node 24 ships with npm 11.6.2.

files.patch:
@@ -26,7 +26,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Setup Node.js (for npm publish)
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
-          node-version: "22"
+          node-version: "24" # npm trusted publishing requires npm 11.5.1+, Node 24 ships with npm 11.6.2
           registry-url: "https://registry.npmjs.org"
 
       - name: Install dependencies
